rulings.Case Title: STEIN OVE SANDVIK VS. LORETTA BOZUNG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn Prevailing Party Attorney Fees On Appeal & In Connection With Related Req. For Injunctive Relief
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 23, 2013, line 1. -PLAINTIFF STEIN SANDVIK'S Motion Prevailing Party Attorney Fees On Appeal & In Connection With Related Request For Injunctive Relief. Plaintiff's Motion for Prevailing Party's Fees on Appeal is OFF CALENDAR for department 501. Any motions in this matter should be calendared in Department 206. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUL D. DORN et al VS. EMC MORTGAGE CORPORATION NOW DOING BUSINESS AS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 23, 2013, line 2. -DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant JP Morgan Chase's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. Counsel for Defendant, Bryan Cave, LLP, failed to comply with SFLR 2.6C and multiple orders of this Court requiring such compliance. See CGC-12-525942, 5/8/13 minute order; CGC-12-527329, 5/29/2013 minute order; CGC-12-527385, 6/25/2013 minute order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER KIRKLEY VS. DRAGAN PODLESNIK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Compel Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 23, 2013, line 3. -PLAINTIFF JENNIFER KIRKLEY'S Motion To Compel Discovery. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Discovery is GRANTED. Plaintiff's Requests for Admissions are Deemed Admitted. Defendant shall provide responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $810. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUNG TRAN et al VS. PERSONALITY HOTELS LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 23, 2013, line 4. -DEFENDANT PERSONALITY HOTELS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Defendant¿s Motion to Strike Complaint is DENIED. Defendant moves to strike ¿Plaintiff¿s Complaint¿ (Notice of Motion 1:20). Even though (a) Defendant sustained its burden under first prong of CCP 425.16 as to the first cause of action for breach of contract, which arises out of (1) breach of assignment, ¿Lease obligations to Song,¿ and termination of Lease by filing unlawful detainer (Complaint ¶18), and (b) Plaintiff failed to show probability of prevailing on the merits as to both alleged breaches; Defendant failed to sustain burden as to the second cause of action for declaratory relief, which does not arise out of protected activity, but is based on renunciation of assignment, occurring before any Notices to Cure or Quit were served. Therefore, Special Motion to Strike Complaint is DENIED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS SUCCESSOR VS. JAN SAMZELIUS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 23, 2013, line 5. -DEFENDANT JAN SAMZELIUS' AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. This demurrer was filed in violation of Court's January 20, 2013 order and improperly raised issues of fact. Complaint sufficiently alleges CCP 1161a unlawful detainer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. RAY K. SHAHANI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 23, 2013, line 6. -DEFENDANT RAY SHAHANI'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is sustained with leave to amend to explain in good faith contradictory allegations in Complaint and First Amended complaint (e.g. 2, 6, 8). = (501/REQ)
